exercises.title: The Slope Machine
exercises.prompt: Typeset the limit definition of the derivative of x² — and what it equals.

exercises.title: Square-Root Area
exercises.prompt: Compute the area under √x from 0 to 1 — integral, bracket step, and answer.

exercises.title: The Impossible Slice
exercises.prompt: The integral the power rule can't touch — it needs a logarithm (and a + C).
